texto: When hiding ourselves behind religiosity becomes the order of the day, grace is left by the wayside; without being honest about our own sin, we will never show compassion toward others. If we are to adorn ourselves with anything, it should be with compassion and honesty—the foundations of connecting to our community.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Matt Litton sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “When hiding ourselves behind religiosity becomes the order of the day, grace is left by the waysi…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a fe, compassion, god, útil em momentos de god e religion.

texto: Scripture is wrought with a clear message of Jesus’ utter disregard for appearance and social rank. In Judean society, it was a major taboo for a man to even speak to a woman who was not his own wife or daughter; yet Jesus interacted regularly with foreign women, He taught women, ignored ritual impurity laws, and readily accepted women into His inner circle of followers.
explicacao: Citação de Matt Litton sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Scripture is wrought with a clear message of Jesus’ utter disregard for appearance and social ran…” articula reflexao, jesus, women em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como women.

texto: While pity shows a lack of respect for other human beings, compassion has its roots in a deep respect for others. Pity is an emotion; compassion is a connection. Compassion sees the other as equal. Compassion happens when we care for another person enough to make his or her problems our own.

Compassion sees the other as equal. Compassion happens when we care for another person enough to make his or her problems our own.

texto: When we dedicate our talent to serving a neighbor, it is possibly one of the highest forms of worship; something sacred transpires when we sacrifice our time and dedicate our God-given loves and talents to one another.
explicacao: Citação de Matt Litton sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “When we dedicate our talent to serving a neighbor, it is possibly one of the highest forms of wor…” articula motivacao, inspiracional, love em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e love.
